claim_boundary: This ledger maps reviewed local coverage and unresolved gaps. OPEN tasks, local tests, comments, and NO_GO bookkeeping do not certify a protocol, consumer, deployment, package, scientific result, or release.

execution_disposition.parallel_activity_boundary: Independent file inspection may run in parallel, but it cannot close dependent tasks out of order.

requested_0_9_release.finding: Current bytes are package 1.0.0-rc.1, wire 1.0, proto ncp.v1, and compact hash 163acc57d8a62b66. A v0.9 label would be incoherent; a genuine 0.9 requires a reviewed normative rebaseline and coordinated consumer migration.

doi_and_zenodo.finding: No DOI or Zenodo archive is assigned or created. Citation metadata remains author-only candidate metadata until the user completes that later publication step.

historical_tag_and_release_cleanup.finding: No erroneous candidate tag or disposable release object exists. Historical annotated tags and release objects are compatibility, migration, and provenance evidence; v0.5.0 through v0.8.0 are machine-bound by released-baseline checks.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Claims and scope
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Candidate docs consistently distinguish local implementation from release, certification, and physical or scientific validation.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Stale remote metadata, historical prose, or a version-only 0.9 relabel could still create a broader public claim than the evidence supports.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: First-principles semantics
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: The protocol and closed registries specify many inputs, transitions, failures, and fail-closed defaults.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Clock, provenance, final actuator routing, and some cross-component invariants are not yet one complete executable semantic model.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Mathematics and statistics
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Simulation outputs are explicitly marked non-calibrated and simulated, and the repository avoids paper-reproduction claims.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: No release-bound calibration, statistical coverage, representative distribution, or physical-validation campaign exists.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Type and state integrity
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Rust validators, bounded decoding, schemas, and closed enums reject broad classes of invalid states.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: All-language construction, defaults, feature combinations, migration, and FFI state-space parity have not been exhaustively proved.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Time, ordering, and replay
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Typed stream positions, exact-session epochs, monotonic high-water fencing, leases, and idempotency contexts are locally tested.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Crash/restart, rollover, delayed delivery, capture replay, and all-client transport lifecycle campaigns remain incomplete.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Identity and provenance
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: The candidate records compact and complete contract identities, corpus digests, profile digests, receipts, and immutable released baselines.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Review evidence is unsigned, some cross-repository inputs are mutable, and complete source-to-installed-artifact lineage is not independently reproduced.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Authentication and cryptography
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Production-secure refuses to start without callback-visible verified peer identity; dev-loopback is visibly insecure and default-deny templates are tested offline.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: The current Zenoh callback API cannot bind a verified peer principal to payload identity, and live rotation/revocation evidence is NOT RUN.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Authority and safety
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Roles, planes, exact sessions, leases, request digests, receipts, governors, and the plant body as final authority constrain mutation locally.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Raw transport access, generic configuration entry points, and the absent live secure profile require explicit quarantine and independent deployment proof.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Hostile inputs and parsers
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Universal JSON limits and duplicate-key-aware ingress exist in key Rust, Python, and TypeScript paths with hostile tests.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Every independent decoder and producer has not yet demonstrated identical duplicate, Unicode, non-finite, unsafe-integer, nesting, and path rejection.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Resource and denial-of-service bounds
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: The contract bounds JSON, dimensions, queues, chunks, retries, and several transport resources before semantic work.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Maximum-size CPU/RSS, allocation, log-volume, overload, and duration evidence is NOT RUN on the declared platform matrix.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Concurrency and lifecycle
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Session, callback, queue, websocket, shutdown, and idempotency behavior has focused local test coverage.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Arbitrary scheduling, cancellation, process crash, restart, leak, and long-duration lifecycle campaigns remain NOT RUN.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Determinism and reproducibility
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Locked dependencies, generated-output diffs, exact manifests, package extraction, and hosted CI provide strong local reproducibility controls.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Signed provenance, pinned multi-platform toolchains, clean-room reproduction, and independently rebuilt final archives are absent.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: API, FFI, and SemVer
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Rust, Python, C/C++, TypeScript, and gateway packages have explicit candidate versions and local archive or build checks.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Stable API snapshots, all feature/platform combinations, installed package matrices, panic boundaries, and support windows remain incomplete.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Schema, wire, and language parity
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Proto-first generation, schema parity, a 269-vector corpus, shared behavior vectors, and generated TypeScript reduce projection drift.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Every producer-consumer language pair, canonical byte emission path, BulkObservation surface, and independent decoder has not passed one exact matrix.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Configuration and deployment
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Named security and plant profiles, ACL templates, package checks, and release hold metadata fail closed locally.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Production-secure is unavailable, generic Zenoh configuration is not profile-typed, and real PKI/router/rollback operations are NOT RUN.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Observability and forensics
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Closed error registries, receipts, audit chains, scientific flags, and explicit unavailable/not-run states support diagnosis.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Live distributed forensics, retention, redaction, clock correlation, crash evidence, and signed incident records are not demonstrated.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Verification and evidence quality
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: The local gate covers Rust, Python, C/C++, TypeScript, proto/schema, corpus, profiles, packages, dependencies, and Buf, with hostile self-tests.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Fuzzing, mutation, sanitizers, real-router security, duration, performance, independent peers, and clean-room evidence remain NOT RUN.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Ecosystem composition
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: NCP documents authority boundaries and treats consumer pins, copied protocol files, and local migrations as non-certifying.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Engram is an uncertified native-1.0 migration while five consumers remain on wire 0.8; cross-repository convergence is therefore NO_GO.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Human factors and governance
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Contribution, security, support, versioning, release-readiness, rollback, and reviewer-comment workflows are documented.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Independent signers, incident drills, withdrawal rehearsal, long-term support decisions, and human reviewer acceptance are absent.

global_twenty_lens_findings.name: Counterfactual and quirky-case review
global_twenty_lens_findings.finding: Adversarial review found a consumed-stream retry in a test, an underconstrained convergence schema, weak handoff evidence helpers, and a contradictory task DAG.
global_twenty_lens_findings.residual_risk: Coverage-guided quirky-case generation and independent red-team reproduction have not run, so unanticipated simple counterexamples may remain.
